message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 180 — workflow startup handshake cx-threaded

RusticMaple: run_workflow_inner(cx: Option<&Cx>) shared impl
refactor. Both public APIs delegate. 4 startup storage sites
(record_workflow_start_action, fetch_workflow_start_action_id,
get_workflow, get_pane) thread cx when Some. 31/31 workflows::
runner tests pass.
